creator: markj@FreeBSD.org
text: I reverted the change for now.  I'm not sure exactly what is causing it, but I suspect it is related to PR 242971.  In particular, even if you have set WITHOUT_CASPER, we should be installing libcasper.h to /usr/include.  If you run make delete-old, libcasper.h may have been removed due to this bug.
